name: Berserk S.H. Figuarts Guts (Berserker Armor)
description: From the dark fantasy "BERSERK" comes GUTS dressed in Berserker Armor he obtained on a quest to a witch's mansion deep in the forest. The set includes GUTS ' huge sword and a variety of accessories and expression parts that let you replicate your favorite scenes.Set Contents: Main Body, Two pairs of optional hands, Two optional expression parts, Bowgun, Cannon, Bowgun hand option, Beherit, Cape, Dragonslayer, Knife.----------TF-Robots is the number 1 online store for collectible Transformer action figures.
